title: Omar Abdullah demands probe into Ganderbal encounter, after family claims ‘slain had no militant links’
content: “I believe the claim of the family should not be dismissed out of hand. At the very least this encounter needs a transparent and time bound probe with the facts made public. Any attempt to obfuscate or delay the announcement of a probe will only damage credibility & that is not in anyone’s interest,” says Mr. Abdullah

title: Congress delegation meets Maha Chief Electoral Officer, demands impartial SIR
content: “The complaints that voters belonging to specific castes and religions were deliberately excluded, large-scale irregularities have been reported in SIR drives that might have benefited the ruling party,” said State Congress president Harshwardhan Sapkal

title: M.P. HC to begin regular hearing of Bhojshala-Kamal Maula mosque dispute case from April 6
content: The development comes a day after the Supreme Court refused to intervene in the matter on a petition from the Muslim side while directing the High Court to consider the objections of all parties on the Archaeological Survey of India (ASI)’s report of a scientific survey of the site

title: Akin to 2024 bypoll, DMK and PMK are set to lock horns yet again in Vikravandi constituency
content: The constituency consists of Vanniyars, Dalits, religious minorities and caste equations, like in other constituencies in Villupuram district, play a significant role in the final outcome here. Though the constituency has a strong presence of Vanniyars, the PMK has never won from here

title: Hema Malini writes to Speaker; says West Bengal denying permission for cultural events
content: “I have written a letter to the Honourable Speaker, highlighting a cultural fascism in West Bengal and how it is adversely affecting several people from the cultural world,” the Mathura MP said in a post on X

title: Tamil Nadu Assembly election 2026: party manifestos
content: This is a compilation of poll manifestos released by prominent political parties in Tamil Nadu ahead of the State Assembly election scheduled to be held on April 23, 2026

title: Trump ‘controlling’ Modi, claims Rahul Gandhi in Assam election rally
content: Mr. Modi handed energy security over to the U.S. to an extent that India cannot buy oil from Russia, Iran, and Iraq without seeking Mr. Trump’s permission, alleges Congress leader; he calls BJP leader Himanta Biswa Sarma the most corrupt Chief Minister of the country

title: On the campaign trail with K.C. Venugopal: When campaign gathers national and global vibes on north Kerala coast
content: From his base in Kerala, K.C. Venugopal directs Parliament strategy in Delhi, connects local fishermen’s concerns to developments in the Strait of Hormuz, and urges voters to unseat Pinarayi Vijayan and choose the Congress as the “real Left” in the State

title: Uttarakhand Police honoured with the President's Police Colours
content: The Chief Minister said the honour places the Uttarakhand Police in the league of select police forces of the country that have received this recognition

title: BJP planning to impose President’s Rule: Mamata

title: Bullet Train progress: Tunnelling work completed for five-km tunnel
content: The 5-km tunnel, which passes between Ghansoli and Shilphata, is part of the 508-km-long MAHSR, connecting Gujarat, Maharashtra and the Union Territory of Dadra & Nagar Haveli

title: T.N. Assembly election: Egmore constituency residents weigh infrastructure upgrades against many long-standing civic problems
content: As Metro Rail work is ongoing in Purasawalkam, traffic congestion and disrupted MTC bus services to some pockets remain core issues; travelling on arterial stretches of Demellows Road - Sydenhams Road and Choolai High Road is a harrowing experience for motorists due to sewer work

title: Watch: What’s at stake in the Tamil Nadu elections 2026?
content: Tamil Nadu’s 2026 Assembly election is shaping up to be more than a familiar DMK vs AIADMK contest. But new entrants are complicating the picture. Here’s all you need to know.

title: Tamil Nadu’s actor-politicians and their crusade against corruption
content: Actor and TVK founder C. Joseph Vijay’s anti-corruption plank is nothing new as the film stars floating their own parties in Tamil Nadu have taken up this theme to earn a name for themselves and garner a massive vote

title: Rajasthan HC issues contempt notices over delay in panchayat, local body elections
content: The High Court had on November 14, 2025 directed the State government to hold these polls by April 15

title: M.P. Congress MLA, another man sentenced to three years in jail for fraud
content: Datia MLA Rajendra Bharti to challenge the verdict in Delhi High Court; while the MLA has been fined ₹1 lakh, a former bank employee convicted for helping him fined ₹2.5 lakh

title: T.N. Assembly election 2026 | BJP may try to split DMK alliance even if it gets a majority: Thol. Thirumavalavan
content: ‘I’ve wanted to contest in the Assembly election since 2021. How we function in the Assembly shapes the public perception. Going to Parliament is an honour. But, when I look at Tamil Nadu politics, the BJP’s strategy of gradually weakening regional parties and establishing itself is a cause for concern’

title: Legislation providing internal quota to Scheduled Castes on hold?
content: More than a month after Governor gave assent to The Karnataka Scheduled Castes (Sub -classification) bill 2025, it is yet to be gazetted

title: T.N. Assembly election: Stalin challenges Prime Minister Modi to repeat Bihar poll jibe during T.N. campaign
content: Asserting that Tamil Nadu has been a haven of peace for people of diverse cultures, the Chief Minister hits out at Mr. Modi for alleging ill-treatment of workers from Bihar in Tamil Nadu. He also criticises the Central government for its denial of Metro Rail projects for Coimbatore and Madurai

title: Madras High Court dismisses case filed by Sasikala’s alleged benamidar in ₹1,911 crore demonetised currency case
content: She had allegedly used the currency to purchase shopping malls and mills across Tamil Nadu when Jayalalithaa had been hospitalised in 2016

title: Real issues take a back seat
content: Electioneering in the run-up to polls has focussed on pacts and deals among various parties. ‘Development’ is a poll issue this time too, but the emphasis on environmental issues has been minimal

title: T.N. Assembly election: Boycott NDA to protect Tamil Nadu’s rights, says Stalin
content: Accusing Edappadi K. Palaniswami of becoming a branch secretary of the BJP, he asserts that the NDA has to be uprooted completely to prevent Tamil Nadu from becoming a land of violence

title: Sholinghur: Residents seek better roads, want govt. to set up godowns to store sugarcane crop
content: Devotees visiting the Sri Lakshminarasimhar temple seek better facilities to reach the hill shrine and affordable govt. accommodation for devotees

title: War in West Asia dampens tourism in Kerala
content: Kerala’s beaches usually teem with foreign tourists by March-April, the fag end of tourism season. But the sector is witnessing mass cancellations due to the conflict in West Asia, which mostly provides transit for Kerala-bound international tourists. Stakeholders say that the tourism industry is facing a double whammy with the war-triggered LPG shortage

title: Power, petroleum and policy in focus at Future Career Conversations
content: With India importing nearly 85% of its oil, panellists noted that vulnerabilities have only intensified since the Ukraine war, which disrupted established supply chains and altered global energy flows

title: West Asia crisis: Rajnath Singh chairs high-level meet to minimise impact on India
content: The meeting, held at Kartavya Bhawan-2, reviewed recent developments in the region and deliberated on proactive steps to mitigate potential economic and strategic fallout arising from the ongoing crisis

title: T.N. legislature fully empowered to take away power to appoint Vice-Chancellors from Governor: State tells Madras High Court

title: Rahul Gandhi urges Modi to withdraw cases against Dalit, Adivasi youth booked after 2018 protests
content: The Opposition leader says the protests were triggered by a judicial pronouncement that diluted provisions of the law meant to protect Dalits and Adivasis from discrimination and violence

title: Competence, not just seniority will define future leadership: Cabinet Secretary
content: During ‘Karmayogi Sadhana Saptah’, a national learning initiative, aimed at strengthening the capabilities of public servants, he remarks that while ‘seniority may act like a force that moves careers upward, it is capability that determines how far one truly rises’

title: 12 years after the split of Andhra Pradesh, Parliament clears Bill to make Amaravati its capital
content: YSRCP was the only political party to oppose the Bill, citing farmers’ demands; TDP says this is a historic day for the ‘entire Telugu community’; Opposition slams 12-year delay as a ‘national shame’

title: Scouts debate the top of the NBA draft class: Peterson or Dybantsa at No. 1?
content: Fit over talent? Versatility over production? NBA scouts and execs break down the conversations happening at the top of the draft.

title: Tiger surprised over DUI arrest, bodycam shows
content: Tiger Woods expressed astonishment as he was handcuffed after crashing his vehicle last week in Florida, according to body camera footage released Thursday.

title: Phil to miss Masters due to family health matter
content: Phil Mickelson announced Thursday that he won't play in next week's Masters and will be out for an extended period as his family continues to "navigate a personal health matter."

title: Not a multitasker: Lloyd focused on Zona, not UNC
content: Arizona head coach Tommy Lloyd said he's not a "multitasker" amid rumors tying him to the North Carolina opening as his team prepares to play Michigan in the Final Four on Saturday.

title: Cadeau rejoins U-M, 'fine' after allergic reaction
content: Michigan starting point guard Elliot Cadeau rejoined his teammates for the Final Four and said Thursday his allergic reaction that required hospitalization a day earlier was due to an accidental exposure to nuts.

title: Bauer returns to U.S. with minor league Ducks
content: Former Cy Young winner Trevor Bauer has signed with the Long Island Ducks of the Atlantic League and is scheduled to pitch opening night April 21 for the minor league team.

title: Cignetti backs Hoover after turnover dig by Dykes
content: Indiana coach Curt Cignetti reiterated his support for transfer quarterback Josh Hoover while responding to recent comments from TCU coach Sonny Dykes about Hoover's high turnovers total.

title: Just foolin': Wizards sorry about $10K shot 'skit'
content: The Wizards have apologized for an April Fools' "skit" in which a planted fan was seemingly tricked into believing he made a half-court shot for $10,000, saying the entire bit was scripted but that they "missed the mark."

title: 🍼 Allen, Steinfeld announce birth of first child

content: Max Verstappen predicted F1's new rule set would underwhelm, and 2026 is proving him correct, so much so that he might just quit the sport entirely.

title: Pete Hegseth Asks US Army Chief Of Staff To Step Down
content: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth has asked the Army's top uniformed officer, Gen. Randy George, to step down, the Pentagon said Thursday, as the United States wages a war against Iran.

title: Centre Clarifies Fuel Supply To Bangladesh Amid Energy Crisis
content: India on Thursday said that it has received a request from Bangladesh for the supply of diesel, which is currently being examined by the government.

title: Iran Targets Oracle Data Centre In Dubai: Report
content: Iran War: Quoting the Revolutionary Guards' navy command, Tasnim news agency also said the data centres of two US firms -- Oracle in Dubai and Amazon in Bahrain -- were targeted.

title: Haridwar Plans To Shift Meat Shops Outside City Ahead Of 2027 Ardh Kumbh
content: According to the Haridwar Municipal Corporation bylaws, the sale and consumption of meat, liquor and eggs are already prohibited within a five-kilometre radius of Har Ki Pauri.

title: "Come Back": Father's Emotional Appeal To One of Maharashtra's Last Maoists
content: Jayaram - alias Nandu Monge Gavade - had left home 14 years ago in a fit of rage after his father scolded him for some household chores he neglected. Today, he is one of the last six Maoists on the records of the state police.

title: Bhagwant Mann Inaugurates Hospital In Punjab Village, To Benefit 50,000 People
content: During his visit, Bhagwant Mann also interacted with patients and their families at the hospital, inquiring about their well-being and reviewing the facilities on the ground.

title: Amid Middle East Crisis, Industrial Diesel Prices Hiked By Rs 28 A Litre
content: According to internal communication seen by NDTV Profit, it applies to high-speed diesel, known as HSD, when sold in bulk directly to commercial and industrial establishments.

title: Iran Is Preparing Maritime Protocol With Oman For Strait Of Hormuz
content: Deputy foreign minister Kazem Gharibabadi told Russia's Sputnik state media that the protocol would apply after the ongoing war with the United States and Israel had ended, setting basic rules to manage ship movements, the IRNA news agency said.

title: Iran's Kharg Oil Exports Continue Despite Bombing, Trump's Seizure Threat
content: There were only a few days since March 1 when two or fewer super tankers were seen loading oil at Kharg.

title: Amazon Cloud Facility In Bahrain Damaged By Iranian Attack
content: Bahrain's Interior Ministry said earlier in the day that civil defence teams were extinguishing a fire at a company facility following what authorities described as an Iranian attack.

title: On Middle East Crisis And LPG, 2 Top Congress Leaders Ditch Party Line
content: Earlier, Congress's Shashi Tharoor and Manish Tewari had deviated from the party stand regarding the war in the Middle-East.

title: Himanta Sarma Slams 'Gen-Z' Candidate Kunki Chowdhury's Party Over Mother's Insta Post
content: Himanta Biswa Sarma claimed that she had posted photos of consuming beef on Instagram and made a remark that, according to him, challenged Sanatan Dharma.

title: Iran's Biggest Bridge Collapses After Strikes, Trump Says 'More To Follow'
content: The bridge that was still under construction was supposed to link Iran's capital Tehran to the western city of Karaj. The bridge is 136 metres high and is presented as an engineering masterpiece of the Middle East.

title: Pak Gangster Among 2 Charged For Grenade Attack On Punjab YouTuber's House
content: The National Investigation Agency (NIA), which took over the case from the Punjab Police last December, has named Shehzad as an absconder in the supplementary chargesheet filed before a special court, an official statement said.

title: 'BJP Against Infiltrators, Not Indigenous Muslims': Amit Shah In Assam
content: The Home Minister was seeking support for ruling ally Asom Gana Parishad (AGP)'s Keshab Mahanta, who is also a senior minister in the state government.

title: Election Commission Hands Over Malda Case To Anti-Terror Agency NIA
content: The Election Commission of India on Thursday handed over the probe into the gherao of the seven judicial officers in West Bengal's Malda district to the NIA, following a Supreme Court directive.

title: Indian-American Lawyer Challenges Trump's Birthright Citizenship Order
content: Before joining Constitutional Accountability Centre (CAC), Smita Ghosh was a Research Fellow at Georgetown University Law Centre, where she taught classes on immigration law and separation of powers.

title: Kochi Corporation to clear waste from public places, install bins after HC directive
content: e-Paper The View From India Looking at World Affairs from the Indian perspective . first day first show news and reviews from the world of cinema and streaming . the weekly newsletter from science writers takes the jargon out of science and puts the fun in!

title: ‘Law & order breakdown’: SC slams gheraoing in Bengal
content: The Supreme Court expressed grave concern over an attack on judicial officers in West Bengal's Malda, citing a breakdown in law and order.  The apex court has issued show-cause notices to top state officials and ordered central forces for officer protection. A central agency will investigate the 'deliberate and calculated' attempt to obstruct justice.

title: 'Make a deal before it’s too late': Trump warns Iran, shares video of Karaj bridge 'tumbling down'
content: In a bold address, former President Trump cautioned Iran, calling for immediate negotiations following US airstrikes that struck a significant bridge just outside of Tehran and a prominent medical institution. Posting a video showcasing the damage to the Karaj bridge, Trump pledged to intensify measures. This development heightens regional instability, hinting at a more aggressive approach from the United States.

title: Opposition flags timing of women’s quota bill changes; government rejects charge
content: Opposition parties in the Rajya Sabha accused the government of political manoeuvring by proposing amendments to the women's reservation law, alleging it's timed for the upcoming assembly elections. The government defended its right to decide legislative timing, emphasising a commitment to women's empowerment and dismissing election-related motives. A heated exchange ensued over the implementation timeline.

title: Iran claims IRGC Navy struck Oracle facility in Dubai, escalating tech-targeted attacks
content: Iran's Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) claims it struck an Oracle data center in Dubai, following threats against US tech firms. This follows a reported attack on an Amazon cloud center in Bahrain. The IRGC warned employees of 18 US companies, including Microsoft and Google, to evacuate facilities, citing retaliation for attacks in Iran.

title: Navy escorting tankers from Strait of Hormuz, no dearth of fuel or gas in country, says defence minister
content: India assures ample fuel and gas supplies amidst West Asia conflict, with the Navy actively escorting tankers through the Strait of Hormuz. Defence Minister Rajnath Singh highlighted PM Modi's diplomatic efforts and the nation's preparedness. Meanwhile, the Navy Chief noted evolving maritime competition beyond energy to critical resources and data, emphasizing increased marine activity and potential infringements on sovereign rights.

title: IPL: Klaasen leads the charge with bat as SRH crush KKR by 65 runs
content: Sunrisers Hyderabad beat Kolkata Knight Riders by 65 runs, powered by Heinrich Klaasen’s steady 52 and strong support from Nitish Kumar Reddy. After a rapid start from Head and Abhishek, SRH post 226/8. KKR begin well but collapse due to poor coordination and wickets, getting bowled out for 161 despite Raghuvanshi’s 52 and Rinku’s effort.

title: J&K SIA files chargesheet against accused involved in harbouring LeT terrorists
content: J&K's State Investigating Agency has charged Sabar Hussain from Poonch for aiding terrorists responsible for the brutal killing of a government employee in Rajouri two years ago. Hussain allegedly provided shelter and support to Lashkar-e-Taiba/TRF militants involved in the fatal attack on Mohammed Razaq. Prima facie, offences under the Unlawful Activities (Prevention) Act are established.

title: Oracle layoffs: 6 AM email that laid off 10,000+ employees did not come from HR
content: Oracle has begun its largest-ever layoffs, impacting thousands globally without prior notice. Employees received termination emails early Tuesday, with immediate system access revocation.  The company's aggressive AI data center expansion is cited as a key driver for these cuts, which could affect up to 30,000 staff. Severance packages require signing documents first.

title: No more Bondi-ing: Trump fires his attorney general for Epstein stain
content: US President Donald Trump has dismissed Attorney General Pam Bondi, his second cabinet member in a month, citing mounting frustration over her handling of the Epstein files and broader performance issues.  Despite public praise, the move highlights Trump's demand for results beyond mere loyalty, leaving a lingering atmosphere of uncertainty within his administration.

title: CM Omar seeks probe in Ganderbal ‘encounter’ after family disputes ‘terrorist’ claim
content: Jammu and Kashmir Chief Minister Omar Abdullah has demanded a swift, transparent investigation into the killing of a man in an alleged encounter. The deceased's family claims he had no terror links and was preparing to join the Army. Authorities are urged to make facts public to maintain credibility amid grave allegations.

title: Gemma 4 debuts: Google's powerhouse AI hits servers and smartphones—Pichai, Hassabis weigh in
content: Google has unveiled Gemma 4, its most capable open-source AI model family, designed for broad accessibility from data centers to smartphones.  These models offer advanced reasoning, agentic workflows, and native image/video processing, with smaller versions optimized for offline mobile use.  Gemma 4 aims to empower developers globally with powerful, versatile AI tools.

title: Sachs warns of escalation, oil disruption in Iran conflict; calls for global action
content: As the conflict stretches into its second month, leading economist Jeffrey Sachs expresses grave concerns regarding the intensifying war and global instability. He denounces US President Trump and Israeli PM Netanyahu for defying expert counsel in initiating the conflict, a choice that could lead to dramatic hikes in oil prices and prompt Iran to reassess its nuclear program.

title: Horoscope today: Daily astrological predictions for April 3, 2026
content: Horoscope Today: Read daily horoscope predictions for April 3, 2026. Know all about the astrological events and influences that will be affecting each of the 12 zodiac signs. Our astrologer has analyzed the movements of the planets and the alignment of the stars to bring you the most accurate and up-to-date horoscope predictions for the day ahead. Get ready to discover what the stars have in store for you today.

title: Martina Navratilova warns Emma Raducanu after Miami Open withdrawal
content: Emma Raducanu’s coaching changes are back in focus after Martina Navratilova urged her to stay with one coach longer. Raducanu, however, prefers flexibility and wants to rediscover her natural game. With mixed results, recent injuries, and no full-time coach, she stands at a key moment. Her next decision could define how her career moves forward.

title: Stephen Curry, Ayesha Curry team up with $150bn mogul
content: Stephen Curry and Ayesha Curry have joined Warren Buffett in reviving his iconic charity lunch through a new auction titled “A Seat At The Table.” The initiative blends Buffett’s legacy in philanthropy with the Currys’ growing influence beyond basketball. With proceeds benefiting the Glide Foundation and Eat. Learn. Play. Foundation, the event aims to create meaningful change in underserved communities. Scheduled for June 24 in Omaha, the auction reflects a powerful collaboration focused on impact, purpose, and long-term community support.

title: Stephen Curry opens up on struggles as Ayesha Curry faces criticism
content: ​Stephen Curry, the NBA legend, is considered one of the most popular athletes in the world because of his talent. While Stephen Curry’s achievements have inspired billions of fans around the world, the Golden State Warriors’ star player remains committed to his career. Amid this, Stephen Curry opens up about what kept him going throughout the years through all the failures.

title: Jonathan Lucroy calls out Kelce brothers, stresses true MLB grind after workout remarks
content: Jonathan Lucroy responded strongly after Travis Kelce and Jason Kelce questioned baseball workouts on their podcast. He explained that MLB players face a long, daily season that demands endurance, not just short bursts of effort. Using his own experience and examples like Nolan Ryan, Lucroy showed why baseball training is built for consistency, not quick intensity.

title: West Bengal poll chaos: Villagers hold SIR officers 'hostage', EC asks NIA to probe case
content: The Election Commission has handed over the investigation into the gherao of judicial officers in Malda, West Bengal, to the National Investigation Agency. This move follows strong criticism from the Supreme Court regarding the state's "complete failure" to protect officers during electoral roll revision. An NIA team is set to begin its probe soon.

title: From TMC to BJP, Congress to CPM: Dynasts take centre stage in West Bengal elections 2026
content: West Bengal's political landscape is witnessing a significant rise in dynastic representation for the 2026 assembly elections. Across major parties like TMC, BJP, Congress, and CPI(M), candidates from established political families are increasingly being fielded. This marks a departure from Bengal's traditional grassroots politics, as parties now prioritize candidates with existing voter recognition and organizational support.

title: The politics of giving: How Tamil Nadu set the template for India's freebies race
content: Indian politics is witnessing an era of pre-poll freebies, with parties offering cash doles and concessions to woo voters. Tamil Nadu has a long history of welfare politics, evolving from subsidized food and education to direct cash transfers and consumer goods, now focusing on universal benefits and fiscal sustainability.

title: $20 million Everest rescue scam clouds Nepal’s climbing season
content: Trekkers given food that induced nausea, weakened them so they couldn't continue on foot & needed emergency flights

title: NHL Standings: Buffalo Sabres on verge of ending NHL-record playoff drought with win over Ottawa Senators
content: The Buffalo Sabres are on the cusp of ending the NHL's longest playoff drought, a 14-year streak, with a win against the Ottawa Senators. This historic achievement follows a remarkable second-half surge, transforming their season from last place in December to a strong playoff contender. A victory on Thursday will secure their postseason berth, marking their first appearance since 2011.

title: WWE announces a major reunion between John Cena and the Undertaker in WrestleMania 42 event
content: WrestleMania 42 in Las Vegas will feature a major reunion as WWE legends The Undertaker and John Cena share the stage. Cena, who is also the official host for the two-night event, will join The Undertaker for a live, unscripted 'Six Feet Under' recording at WWE World. This highly anticipated fan event promises candid conversations between two iconic figures.

title: Nato's razor edge: What happens if Trump walks away?
content: President Trump is again threatening to withdraw the US from Nato, citing allies' financial contributions and their refusal to join efforts to secure the Strait of Hormuz.  Despite US military dominance, European nations are increasing defense spending, partly as a hedge against potential US withdrawal.  This move could destabilize global security.

title: KKR vs SRH: Run-out chaos! Cameron Green falls prey to bizarre mix-up - Watch
content: Cameron Green's IPL 2026 campaign hit a new low with a peculiar run-out against Sunrisers Hyderabad. After SRH posted a formidable 226, KKR's chase began explosively. However, a miscommunication in the Powerplay saw Green dismissed for a mere 2, adding to KKR's early struggles and highlighting a costly hesitation.

title: Sonali Bendre, Goldie Behl accused of land grab; actress calls it false
content: A farmer from Pune district has filed a civil lawsuit against actor Sonali Bendre and her filmmaker husband Goldie Behl, accusing them of land encroachment and “mafia-style” intimidation. The actor, however, has denied the allegations, calling the case a false attempt to extort money.

title: Sarpanch pati to menstrual hygiene: Raghav Chadha’s push in Parliament and on Insta
content: The Aam Aadmi Party has replaced Raghav Chadha as its Rajya Sabha deputy leader with Ashok Mittal, signaling a strategic shift in parliamentary roles. Chadha, previously a prominent voice, will no longer be part of the party's official speaking lineup, despite his recent engagement on public interest issues and a growing social media presence.

title: Balochistan, Afghanistan, Iran: Is Pakistan running out of strategic room?
content: Pakistan faces a strategic crossroads, caught between alliances and regional conflicts.  Past involvements in foreign wars, driven by external powers, have led to domestic instability and blowback.  Now, a new defence pact with Saudi Arabia and escalating conflict with Afghanistan highlight the nation's struggle to balance relevance with long-term stability, risking further entanglement.

title: ‘Not everything you see is true’: LSG release full video after Goenka-Pant clip goes viral
content: Lucknow Super Giants have clarified the on-field interaction between owner Sanjiv Goenka and captain Rishabh Pant after their recent defeat. The franchise released a video to counter speculation, emphasizing that "not everything you see is the true story." This follows a similar public exchange between Goenka and then-captain KL Rahul last season.

title: Pepe Marti turns ‘professor Pepe’ to explain Pit Boost to his Formula E fans: Watch
content: Cupra Kiro driver Pepe Marti is back with yet another interesting video on social media. The 20-year-old Formula E rookie has shared an explainer video to educate his fans about the Pit Boost concept in Formula E, one of the standout features of the electric racing series. He is currently 12th in Formula E Drivers' Standings.

title: Nuclear icebreakers & submarines: How Russia, China aim to shatter US hold on global trade
content: The Arctic is emerging as a critical new maritime highway, driven by Russia and China's strategic investments in infrastructure and icebreaker fleets. This development offers shorter trade routes between Asia and Europe, challenging traditional chokepoints and reshaping global power dynamics as the US plays catch-up.

title: India attends UK-led talks on Strait of Hormuz opening; MEA says 'in touch with Iran'
content: India is set to join the UK-led discussions focusing on reopening the vital Strait of Hormuz, as confirmed by the Ministry of External Affairs. The Foreign Secretary is expected to represent India at this pivotal meeting.

title: Mustafizur row: IPL chief Dhumal breaks silence - 'Govt is supportive of ...'
content: IPL chairman Arun Singh Dhumal called Mustafizur Rahman’s release from Kolkata Knight Riders “unfortunate” after BCCI instructed the move, sparking controversy. The issue had wider fallout, with Bangladesh later replaced by Scotland in the 2026 T20 World Cup. Dhumal said the government has no role in daily cricket matters, while KKR confirmed they followed BCCI directives.

title: Are you a ‘worker’ under India’s labour codes? How it differs from white‑collar employment
content: Overall, the labour codes aim to balance protection, flexibility and clarity—supporting both employee welfare and organisational efficiency in a unified legal framework.

title: 'When you were in caves ...': Iran taunts US over 'Stone Age' threat
content: Iran has sharply retorted to US Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth's "stone age" threats, highlighting Iran's ancient civilization and resilience. The Iranian embassy in South Africa countered that while Americans were "still in caves," Iran was inscribing human rights.

title: 'This isn't a show!' Macron ridicules Trump after US prez mocks his marriage
content: French President Macron has sharply criticised Donald Trump's remarks about his marriage, deeming them "neither elegant nor up to standard." Trump's comments, made during a speech and a video, also targeted Nato allies. French political figures across the spectrum have condemned Trump's personal attacks, emphasizing the gravity of global issues.

title: Preview and predictions: Which teams will win in the semifinals?

title: Women's March Madness: The 15 best players left in the field
content: the final women's college basketball player rankings for 2025-26 are pared down to 15 as the tournament shifts to Phoenix for the national semifinals . Sarah Strong has been no. 1 since the preseason rankings . she is trying to replicate what former Huskies great Breanna Stewart did: win four national championships in four seasons .

title: Betting odds for the Masters, future golf majors: Scheffler, McIlroy favored
content: Scottie Scheffler's odds to win the first major of the year, the Masters, stand at +405 a week ahead of his tee-off time . the top five are a who's who of past major winners, with Rory McIlroy , Jon Rahm , Bryson DeChambeau and Xander Schauffele most frequently occupying top five .

title: Men's Final Four has a Carolina blue backdrop
content: it's been over a week since north Carolina fired coach Hubert Davis . there have been few updates on the north Carolina Tar Heels' coaching search . despite a dynamic men's final four in Indianapolis this weekend, UNC will be a primary topic of discussion .

title: Why Big Ten dominance might be here to stay
content: coach dusty May asked how recent rule changes in college athletics helped league teams have such success . this narrative ignores many past scandals in the league, let alone that the Big Ten has produced plenty of contenders through the years . the overall sentiment is somewhat fair, however, though .

title: Two-time All-Pro, 2019 DPOY Gilmore retiring
content: two-time All-Pro cornerback Stephon Gilmore announced his retirement on friday . the 35-year-old was selected a first-team All-pro in both 2018 and 2019 . he led the NFL with six interceptions and 20 passes defended .
